title: Aurora, 33044, Sea Sparkles Mermaid Serena, 10In, Soft Toy, Pink and Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Sea Sparkles Mermaid Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Realistic embroidered facial features with multi-coloured fabric and yarn hair
Children will love this cute, colourful and hugely collectable character
description: Product Description Sea Sparkles is Aurora's fabulous range of Mermaids. Every Mermaid is expertly made with exquisite detailing. Serena's tail is made of a beautiful multi-colouredfabric and is moveable for added play value. She has gorgeous brown coloured hair and is sure to appeal to children of all ages. Create your own adventures in the Sea Sparkles World. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Recommended over 3 years Box Contains Item See more
